label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Claire is dancing with at the end of the dance. We have five dancers named Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve, each with their original partners: Alice with Helga, Bob with Jamie, Claire with Ophelia, Dave with Karl, and Eve with Rodrigo. The sequence of partner switches is important here. Let me track each change step by step. I'll keep track of everyone's partners after each swap. First, let's note the initial pairings: 1. Alice - Helga 2. Bob - Jamie 3. Claire - Ophelia 4. Dave - Karl 5. Eve - Rodrigo Now, the first switch is Eve and Bob switching partners. So Eve, who was with Rodrigo, will now have Bob's partner, which is Jamie. And Bob will take Eve's original partner, Rodrigo. So after the first switch: 1. Alice - Helga 2. Bob - Rodrigo 3. Claire - Ophelia 4. Dave - Karl 5. Eve - Jamie Next, Dave and Claire switch partners. Dave was with Karl, and Claire was with Ophelia. After switching: 1. Alice - Helga 2. Bob - Rodrigo 3. Claire - Karl 4. Dave - Ophelia 5. Eve - Jamie Then, Claire and Bob switch partners. Claire is currently with Karl, and Bob is with Rodrigo. After this switch: 1. Alice - Helga 2. Bob - Karl 3. Claire - Rodrigo 4. Dave - Ophelia 5. Eve - Jamie Next, Dave and Alice switch partners. Dave is with Ophelia, and Alice is with Helga. After this switch: 1. Alice - Ophelia 2. Bob - Karl 3. Claire - Rodrigo 4. Dave - Helga 5. Eve - Jamie Finally, Claire and Eve switch partners. Claire is with Rodrigo, and Eve is with Jamie. After this switch: 1. Alice - Ophelia 2. Bob - Karl 3. Claire - Jamie 4. Dave - Helga 5. Eve - Rodrigo So, at the end of the dance, Claire is dancing with Jamie. Checking the options, Jamie is option B. Let me just recheck each step to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First swap: Eve (Rodrigo) and Bob (Jamie) switch to Bob (Rodrigo) and Eve (Jamie). Correct. Second swap: Dave (Karl) and Claire (Ophelia) switch to Claire (Karl) and Dave (Ophelia). Correct. Third swap: Claire (Karl) and Bob (Rodrigo) switch to Claire (Rodrigo) and Bob (Karl). Correct. Fourth swap: Dave (Ophelia) and Alice (Helga) switch to Alice (Ophelia) and Dave (Helga). Correct. Fifth swap:
